name: Atgasedd Doll
description: Are you feeling it? Buffs you and debuffs enemies, scaling a small amount off of your CHA stat.

obtainMethods.requiredItems: 1  Condensed C Blob & 1  Glob of Unigedd

attacks.name: Attack Type 1
attacks.description: Summons a symbol with a red glow, applying 'Atgasedd' (+X% Boost) to player for 1 turn.

attacks.name: Attack Type 2
attacks.description: Summons a symbol with a yellow glow, applying 'Atgno' (+2X Bonus) to player for 1 turn.

attacks.name: Attack Type 3
attacks.description: Summons a symbol with a blue glow for 1 hit of 100% Melee Fear damage; applies 'Bradychwyd' (-2X Bonus) to target for 1 turn.

attacks.name: Attack Type 4
attacks.description: Summons a symbol with a green glow for 1 hit of 100% Melee Fear damage; applies 'Mwrn' (-X% Boost) to target for 1 turn.

attacks.name: Attack Type 5
attacks.description: Summons a symbol with a purple glow, applying 'Unigedd' (+X Block/Parry/Dodge Defense) to player for 2 turns.

notes:
X is equal to [5 + (Player's CHA)/40], rounded up.
Atgasedd Doll's damage is affected by the global CHA damage buff, increasing its damage by [(Player's CHA)/10], rounded down.
Atgasedd Doll's attack rotation always follows and repeats the above cycle; re-equipping Atgasedd Doll will not reset its rotation.

name: Babmuu
description: This strange creature seems to be made of living stone. It has a thick rocky hide that protects it from all but the most extreme conditions and fires streams of compressed dirt from its eyes as an attack!

attacks.name: Attack Type 1
attacks.description: Approaches target and fires streams of compressed dirt from its eyes for 1 hit of 100% Melee Stone damage. (Rate: 50%)

attacks.name: Attack Type 2
attacks.description: Approaches target and headbutts it for 1 hit of 100% Melee Fire damage. (Rate: 50%)

name: Baby Chimera
description: This tiny, adorable, legendary beast hatched from your mysterious egg! It deals damage that scales with your level, and provides a shield that scales with your level! Proof of your victory over the Otherworldly Creatures Challenge board.
damage:
Scaled, rounded up
Min: [(Player's level)*2/5 - 10], bounded below 1
Max: [(Player's level)*2/5 + 10]

obtainMethods.requiredItems: 1  Chunk of Void Radiance & 1  Core-Strapped Egg

attacks.name: Attack Type 1
attacks.description: Crouches in place, applying 'Chimeric Defense' (+X Block/Parry/Dodge Defense) to player for 3 turns, where X is equal to [(Player's level) + (Player's CHA)/4], rounded up.

attacks.name: Attack Type 2
attacks.description: Approaches target, claws at it, and whips it for 3 hits of 100% Melee Nature damage, amounting to 300% damage. (Rate: 80%)

attacks.name: Attack Type 3
attacks.description: Approaches target and breathes fireballs at it for 4 hits of 100% Melee Fire damage, amounting to 400% damage; applies 'Tiny Fireworks', a 75% Magic Fire DoT effect, to target for 3 turns. (Rate: 20%)

notes:

Scaled, rounded up

attacks.name: Attack Type 1
attacks.description: Approaches target and bites it for 1 hit of 100% Magic Stone damage.

attacks.name: Attack Type 2
attacks.description: Approaches target and blasts it for 3 hits of 100% Magic Stone damage, amounting to 300% damage; applies 'Coal Dust' (-X Bonus) to target for 2 turns, where X is equal to [10 + (Player's level)/2 + (Player's CHA)/5], rounded up.

notes:
Attack Type 2 will only be used on the fifth turn of battle, and again every 16 turns thereafter.
Pet is animated; it sways back and forth in place.

attacks.description: Approaches target and bites it for 1 hit of 100% Magic Ebil damage.

attacks.name: Attack Type 2
attacks.description: Approaches target and barks at it for 1 hit of 100% Magic Ebil damage.

attacks.name: Attack Type 3
attacks.description: Approaches target and furiously bites it for 5 hits of 30% Magic Ebil damage, amounting to 150% damage.

attacks.name: Attack Type 4
attacks.description: Approaches target and shoots a laser at it for 3 hits of 100% Magic Ebil damage, amounting to 300% damage.

attacks.name: Attack Type 5

Attack Types 1 and 2 will only be used while the player has greater than 50% of their maximum HP remaining. (Rate: 50% each)

levelVariants.name: Prince Linus
levelVariants.description: Armed with the royal shrinking ray, your tiny penguin pal has a 2% chance to SHRINK your opponent!

attacks.name: Attack Type 1
attacks.description: Approaches target and jumps into it for 1 hit of 100% Melee Ice damage.

attacks.name: Attack Type 2 /  2.1
attacks.description: Approaches target and uses its shrink ray, reducing both the target's max and current HP to 90% of their previous values, as well as physically reducing the target's size. (Pop-up: Linus uses SHRINK on !)

levelVariants.notes:
Attack Type 2's rate is equal to [(Pet's Crit) + (Player's LUK)/10]: (Pop-up: Need <=  to shrink | Rolled )
  • If the target has already been shrunken, its HP and size will not be reduced again. (Pop-up: Linus tries... but  is already SHRUNK!)
  • If the target's Shrink Resist (inclusive of All Resist) is greater than an unknown second roll value, it will resist the shrinking effect. (Pop-up: Linus tries... but  resists!)
Attack Type 2 previously renamed targets 'Shrunken '; due to its potential to break battle mechanics, this was removed on  July 3rd, 2020.
Despite requiring a DC item to obtain, the Platinum Penguin Shrink Ray merge version of this pet is not DC tagged, thus ineligible for free storage.
Pet is animated; it sways back and forth continuously.

shared.description: PoeLala is a very helpful moglin! She will use her magic to increase either your Crit, Bonus, Block, Parry, or Dodge. The higher level PoeLala you have, the more her magic will help you!

attacks.name: Attack Type 1
attacks.description: Casts a spell, applying one of the following stackable effects to the player for 2 turns, where X is equal to the number of times the effect has been applied:
notes:
Silver Orb: Applies 'PoeLaLa's Block Buff' (+X Block Defense), capped at +10.
  • Blue Orb: Applies 'PoeLaLa's Parry Buff' (+X Parry Defense), capped at +10.
  • Green Orb: Applies 'PoeLaLa's Dodge Buff' (+X Dodge Defense), capped at +10.
  • Red Orb: Applies 'PoeLaLa's Crit Buff' (+X Crit), capped at +2.
  • Yellow Orb: Applies 'PoeLaLa's Bonus Buff' (+X Bonus), capped at +5.

attacks.name: Attack Type 1
attacks.description: Approaches target and flies into it for 1 hit of {100 + [(12 + X)*Y]}% Pierce Fear damage, where:
notes:
X is equal to [(Player's CHA)/20], rounded up.
  • Y is equal to the number of DoT effects applied to the target, capped at 6.

attacks.name: Attack Type 2
attacks.description: Approaches target and claws at it for 1 hit of 100% Pierce Fear damage; applies one of the following effects:
notes:
Upon first use, applies 'Sporca Toxin', a 50% Magic Poison DoT effect, to target for 3 turns.
  • Upon second use, applies 'Sporca Venom', a 50% Magic Poison DoT effect, to target for 3 turns.

Attack Type 2 will only be used�twice in succession�on the fifth and sixth turns of battle, and again every 6 turns thereafter respectively.
Pet is animated; it hovers up and down in place, while flapping its wings.

name: Stan the ScanOrb
description: The one and only, Stan the ScanOrb! Accept no substitutes! Made in Lore.

obtainMethods.location: Starcrossed - The Thorns of the Rose

attacks.name: Attack Type 1
attacks.description: Scans target, applying 'Scanned' (-15 All Resist) to target for 2 turns inclusive.

attacks.name: Attack Type 2
attacks.description: Pulses, applying 'Heal Aura' (-15 Health Resist) to player for 2 turns inclusive.

notes:
Attack Type 1 will only be used while the player has greater than 50% of their maximum HP remaining.
Attack Type 2 will only be used while the player has less than or equal to 50% of their maximum HP remaining.
Stan the ScanOrb will display one of the following pop-up headlines during its turn, at random:
quote:
*blip* Actually, that would be an insult to vegetables.
*blip* Everyone expects the Stan-ish Inquisition.
*blip* Face Scan of target suggests 99% resemblance to Magus Z's
*blip* The real question is... Where is Waldo?
*blip* You, sir, have the intellect of a vegetable.
*blip* Your collective grey matter is a figure that approaches negative infinity.
*blip* Your father was... Actually, let's not talk about your father...
*blip* Your mother was a Sneevil.

description: This strange creature comes from the rain forests of a distant land. Its natural venom is a very dangerous poison but when it gets REALLY mad it throws poo.

attacks.name: Attack Type 1
attacks.description: Walks up to the enemy and throws its arms in a circle to strike for one hit of 100% Melee Poison damage

name: Turdraken Wyvernling
description: This diminutive part-fowl, part-dragon seems to have traveled here from regions unknown in search of food! Luckily it found you to take care of it! Applies a DoT effect and scales with your level.
damage:
Scaled, rounded up
Min: [Level*2/5 - 10], bounded below 1
Max: [Level*2/5 + 10]

attacks.name: Attack Type 1 /  1.1
attacks.description: Approaches target and crashes into it for 1 hit of 100% Magic Wind damage; applies 'Windgust', a 90% Magic Wind DoT effect, to target for 5 turns.

notes: Pet is animated; Turdraken Wyvernling flaps its wings to hover.

name: Twilly
description: It's Twilly!

obtainMethods.location: A Hero is Bored -> Offer to Help!,  A Hero Is Thawed -> Offer to Help!,  Falconreach /  Wrath of Xan Falconreach (All Versions) ->  Twilly -> Invite Twilly -> Yes,  Night of the Ebil Dread -> To the War! -> Invite Twilly,  Eclipse of DOOM -> To the War! -> Invite Twilly,  March of the Slimes -> To the War! -> Invite Twilly

notes:
Falconreach access points require player to be level 3 or higher to invite Twilly.
Twilly's attacks previously have the following attack rates:
  • 'Attack': 70%
  • 'Heal Ally': 30%
Twilly's heal from 'Heal Ally' was lowered from 8% of player's max HP to 5% of player's max HP on  June 6th, 2025.
Twilly was updated with Manual Pet Actions on  September 5th, 2025.
